title: calamus oblongus
intro: Calamus oblongus, also known as Acorus oblongus or sweet flag, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of calamus oblongus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Calamus oblongus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies such as Ayurvedic medicine.
